title: Super Mario Paint - Marvin's Theme (Looney Tunes Collector: Alert!)
description:
I'm starting to think I really missed the ball on the whole Halloween thing.

So this was actually one of the very earliest tunes I wanted to try my hand at covering, but quickly gave up on because of the sheer density of instruments (not to mention the octave limit). So I did The High Seas instead. Now, once again thanks to SMP's expanded capabilities (and having actually gleaned a few things from all these stupid transcriptions by this point), here we are! I decided to get a little fancy with this one, so as a result the filesize is about 15 times what it usually is.

Alberto González is some kinda musical genius, I tell you hwat.
